note: A private second-level ledger of expenses treated as mental-state inputs and portfolio instruments. Five coded positions. Each code carries a set of descriptions that rotates per render, because none of the descriptions is exactly right. Nothing here names a substance.

descriptions: the long-only volatility hedge — smooths the residuals without paying alpha
a dampener on the high-frequency noise of being nineteen
ambient music in the asset class of moods — necessary, unremarkable, rarely the reason anything works
the parameter that makes the other parameters feel less load-bearing
a small monthly premium paid to be slightly less present
a volatility-suppressing position whose drawdowns are measured in productivity, not dollars
the micro-dose cortisol annuity — paid out minute by minute during work
the shortest-duration, highest-frequency trade in the mental-state book
a treadmill that keeps the rest of the body from noticing it is running
the coupon you clip on every deep-focus hour
the line item where the marginal dollar has the highest Sharpe and the lowest conviction
a perfectly accounted tax on focus, payable in advance
the social liquidity premium — paid to narrow the bid-ask between people
a bridge asset between two illiquid social markets
the option to be more interested in whatever anyone is saying, exercised Friday through Sunday
an asset class whose returns are purely relational and whose volatility is someone else's
a coupon on attentional discount — buy once, market closes early
a weekly rebalance against the analytical tilt of the rest of the portfolio
the rare-event dividend — paid in kind, quarterly at most
a scheduled sampling of a distribution the rest of the year pretends does not exist
the one position whose returns are measured in insight per dollar, not dollar per hour
a deliberate anti-correlation to the weekly cron
a position sized to a full year's signal-to-noise
the mental-state equivalent of Bucket E deploying into a 30% drawdown — rare, intentional, quiet
the convex vision option — long-dated, out-of-the-money, rarely exercised
a lottery ticket on a future self whose taste is uncorrelated with the current one's
the position whose thesis requires the longest observation window to evaluate
a deliberate break with the momentum factor in the rest of the mental-state portfolio
an annual or bi-annual subscription to a version of attention the weekly cron cannot produce
a scheduled disagreement with every other position in this ledger
